chat.empty_state: Send a message to start chatting
chat.slash_new_desc: Start a new conversation or coding thread
chat.slash_plan_desc: Enter plan mode for the current coding thread
chat.slash_review_desc: Expand into a focused review prompt
chat.slash_skill_desc: Save this conversation as a reusable skill (needs approval)
chat.slash_blocked_while_loading: Wait for the current response to finish, or use /cancel.
chat.slash_plan_unavailable: Plan mode is available in coding threads.
chat.slash_agent_unavailable: Worktree agents are available in coding threads.
chat.slash_agent_queued_and_started: Worktree agent task queued and run started: {branch}
chat.slash_agent_failed: Could not queue worktree agent task: {error}
chat.setup_message: To get started, configure your LLM server endpoint in Settings. Caverno works with any OpenAI-compatible API (LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM, etc.).
chat.record_personal_eval_case: Record this session as an eval case
chat.record_personal_eval_case_requires_logs: Enable LLM session logs to record eval cases
chat.companion_git_unavailable_message: Git state is unavailable for this project.
chat.coding_empty_state: Start a coding thread for this project
chat.coding_no_project_title: Add a project to start coding
chat.coding_no_project_message: Register a local project and create coding threads for it.
chat.plan_mode_subtitle: Describe the coding task in chat. Caverno will propose a reviewable workflow and task list before implementation starts.
chat.plan_mode_ready: An approved plan is attached to this thread. You can continue from the saved workflow or generate a fresh plan.
chat.plan_mode_empty: Send a coding request and plan mode will generate a reviewable plan automatically.
chat.workflow_decision_subtitle: Pick the option that best matches how this thread should proceed.
chat.plan_proposal_subtitle: Review the generated workflow and tasks, then approve when you are ready to start implementation.
chat.plan_proposal_generating: Generating a workflow and task breakdown...
chat.plan_proposal_execute_prompt: Use the approved plan for this coding thread. Start with the highest-value task, explain the small change you are making, then implement it. After each completed task, continue to the next pending saved task automatically unless you are blocked, requirements changed, or the approved workflow must change. If the app shows file or command approvals, treat them as sufficient and do not ask for duplicate permission in natural language.
chat.goal_pending_until_send: Goal setup will start when you send your next message.
chat.goal_objective_hint: Describe the coding outcome to keep in focus
chat.goal_suggestion_question: What coding outcome should this thread keep focused on?
chat.goal_suggestion_failed: Could not draft a goal. Your message was kept so you can retry or set the goal manually.
chat.plan_document_saved_with_issues: Plan document saved with validation issues: {error}
chat.plan_document_approved_refresh_failed: Plan draft approved, but execution tasks could not be refreshed.
chat.plan_document_reverted: Draft reverted to the approved plan.
chat.plan_document_tasks_refreshed: Execution tasks refreshed from the approved plan.
chat.plan_document_tasks_refresh_failed: Could not refresh execution tasks from the approved plan.
chat.plan_document_regeneration_started: Generating a new draft plan from the current thread context.
chat.plan_document_draft_subtitle: This editable markdown draft is saved with the current thread.
chat.plan_document_approved_subtitle: This thread keeps an approved markdown snapshot of the plan.
chat.plan_document_pending_subtitle: A newer draft exists, but this thread is still following the last approved plan.
chat.plan_document_sheet_subtitle: Edit the markdown artifact attached to this thread. Structured workflow and task helpers are derived from the approved plan when available.
chat.plan_document_validation_preview: This markdown can be parsed into an execution projection.
chat.plan_document_validation_fallback: Plan document could not be parsed.
chat.plan_document_approve_preview_subtitle: Confirm the derived stage and tasks before replacing the approved plan.
chat.plan_document_hydrated_subtitle: This view keeps the approved plan text intact and overlays the latest task state from this thread.
chat.plan_document_hydrated_stale_subtitle: This view overlays the latest known task state, but the execution projection should be refreshed before relying on it.
chat.plan_document_hydrated_state_blocked_des: Resolve the blocker or replan from it before continuing the saved plan.
chat.plan_document_hydrated_state_active_desc: Review the latest outcome or validation before moving to the next saved task.
chat.plan_document_hydrated_state_ready_descr: Start the next pending task when you want the assistant to continue.
chat.plan_document_hydrated_state_complete_de: All saved tasks are complete. Review the result or edit the plan if requirements changed.
chat.plan_document_hydrated_state_empty_descr: Refresh execution tasks from the approved plan document before continuing.
chat.plan_document_open_questions_subtitle: Track unresolved planning questions without rewriting the approved markdown.
chat.plan_document_history_subtitle: Restore an older draft when the latest replan goes in the wrong direction.
chat.plan_document_history_restored: Restored the selected revision as the current draft.
chat.open_question_answer_subtitle: Capture the answer so the next replan can use it.
chat.open_question_answer_placeholder: Write the answer or decision that should carry into the next draft.
chat.open_question_answer_saved: Saved the open question answer for the next replan.
chat.plan_document_diff_subtitle: Review how the saved tasks would change before approving this draft.
chat.plan_document_diff_invalid: Task diff preview is unavailable because the draft could not be parsed: {error}
chat.plan_document_diff_no_changes: No task-level changes were detected between the approved plan and the current draft.
chat.workflow_subtitle: Keep the goal, constraints, and review criteria pinned to this coding thread.
chat.workflow_empty: No workflow saved yet. Capture the current goal before implementation drifts.
chat.workflow_proposal_subtitle: Review the proposed workflow and save it only if it matches this coding thread.
chat.workflow_generate_error: Could not generate a workflow proposal.
chat.workflow_sheet_subtitle: This lightweight spec stays attached to the current coding thread and is included in future prompts.
chat.workflow_quick_actions_hint: Run the next workflow step with one tap. The selected action also updates the saved stage.
chat.workflow_quick_actions_busy: Quick actions are disabled while the assistant is already working.
chat.workflow_quick_clarify_prompt: Use the saved workflow for this coding thread. Ask up to five clarifying questions that should be resolved before implementation. Order them by importance and keep them easy to answer.
chat.workflow_quick_plan_prompt: Use the saved workflow for this coding thread. Write a concise implementation plan that respects the goal, constraints, and acceptance criteria. Keep it scoped to the current thread.
chat.workflow_quick_tasks_prompt: Use the saved workflow for this coding thread. Break the plan into actionable tasks. For each task, include likely target files and a short validation step.
chat.workflow_quick_implement_prompt: Use the saved workflow for this coding thread. Start with the highest-value next task, explain the small change you are making, then implement it. After each completed task, continue to the next pending saved task automatically unless you are blocked, requirements changed, or the approved workflow must change. If the app shows file or command approvals, treat them as sufficient and do not ask for duplicate permission in natural language.
chat.workflow_quick_review_prompt: Use the saved workflow for this coding thread. Review the current work against the acceptance criteria and call out gaps, risks, or missing validation first.
chat.workflow_goal_hint: Describe the outcome this thread should produce.
chat.workflow_constraints_hint: One item per line. Include architecture, scope, or risk boundaries.
chat.workflow_acceptance_hint: One item per line. Describe what must be true before this is done.
chat.workflow_open_questions_hint: One item per line. Capture uncertainties to resolve before broad changes.
chat.workflow_tasks_empty: No saved tasks yet. Add tasks here to track implementation and review them one by one.
chat.workflow_tasks_refresh_required: Refresh execution tasks from the approved plan document to continue.
chat.workflow_tasks_proposal_subtitle: Review the proposed task list before replacing the saved tasks for this thread.
chat.workflow_tasks_projection_fresh: The execution task projection matches the approved plan document.
chat.workflow_tasks_projection_stale: The approved plan changed after the last task projection refresh. Refresh execution tasks before relying on them.
chat.workflow_tasks_projection_unavailable: Execution tasks are not available yet. Refresh them from the approved plan document first.
chat.workflow_edit_blocked_by_plan: Edit the saved plan document instead of editing the derived workflow projection.
chat.workflow_task_edit_blocked_by_plan: Edit the approved plan document instead of editing derived tasks directly.
chat.workflow_task_sheet_subtitle: Track implementation-ready tasks with target files, validation steps, and notes.
chat.workflow_task_validation_hint: Optional command or check for this task.
chat.workflow_task_next_step_pending: Start this task when you are ready for the assistant to continue.
chat.workflow_task_next_step_in_progress: Wait for the current result, or mark it complete after validation passes.
chat.workflow_task_next_step_validation_faile: Review the failed validation, then retry validation or replan this task.
chat.workflow_task_next_step_blocked: Resolve the blocker, then retry validation or replan from the blocker.
chat.workflow_task_next_step_blocked_missing_: Add a blocked reason so the next replan has useful context.
chat.workflow_task_next_step_completed: This task is complete. Continue with the next pending task or review the result.
chat.workflow_task_blocked_reason_required: Add a blocked reason before saving it.
chat.workflow_task_blocked_reason_editor_hint: Describe what is currently blocking this task.
chat.workflow_task_use_prompt_intro: Use the saved task "{title}" from this coding thread.
chat.workflow_task_use_prompt_outro: Move this task forward while respecting the saved workflow, and explain the next concrete change before implementing it. When this task is complete, continue to the next pending saved task automatically unless you are blocked, requirements changed, or the approved workflow must change. If the app shows file or command approvals, treat them as sufficient and do not ask for duplicate permission in natural language.
chat.workflow_task_review_prompt_outro: Review this completed task against the saved workflow and call out gaps, risks, or missing validation first.
chat.workflow_task_validation_prompt_intro: Run the saved validation step for task "{title}" in this coding thread.
chat.workflow_task_validation_prompt_outro: Use the approved plan and the current task context, run the validation when possible, and report failures before suggesting a replan.

drawer.title: Conversation History
drawer.delete_all_confirm: Delete all conversation history? This cannot be undone.
drawer.delete_all_threads_confirm: Delete every thread in this project? This cannot be undone.
drawer.project_delete_confirm: Remove "{name}" and all of its coding threads?

message.input_hint_coding: Ask for a bug fix, refactor, diff, or git command...
message.input_hint_plan: Describe the coding task and plan mode will propose a workflow before implementation...
message.drop_image_unsupported: Drop an image file to attach it
message.stt_unavailable: Could not start voice input. Check your environment or permissions.
message.attached_as_path: Large file — referenced by path and analyzed on disk
message.project_access_restore_failed: Saved project folder access could not be restored.
message.project_access_reselect_help: Re-select the project folder to grant access again and continue coding.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Caverno
onboarding.message: Start with the local defaults, or restore a saved setup before your first chat.
onboarding.connect_body: Use any OpenAI-compatible endpoint from General settings.
onboarding.chat_body: Use chat, coding threads, routines, voice, and tools from the main screen.
onboarding.restore_body: Import a Caverno settings JSON now to bring back your endpoint, model, tools, and preferences.

settings.title: Settings
settings.menu_slash_commands_desc: Custom prompt templates for the composer
settings.menu_advanced_desc_computer_use_unavaila: Computer Use unavailable on this device
settings.menu_computer_use_desc: Helper permissions, smoke checks, and manual sign-off
settings.computer_use_header_desc: Caverno Computer Use owns Accessibility and Screen & System Audio Recording, executes approved desktop actions, and all TCC grants remain user-operated.
settings.reset_confirm: Reset all settings to default values? Caverno will quit after the reset.
settings.reset_done: Settings have been reset. Caverno will quit.
settings.demo_mode_desc: Simulate AI responses without a server connection
settings.llm_provider_helper: Apple Foundation Models appears on supported Apple devices and is selectable when ready.
settings.nvidia_nim_preset_helper: Uses NVIDIA API Catalog at https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1. Paste your NVIDIA API key before chatting.
settings.nvidia_nim_preset_applied: NVIDIA NIM preset applied. Paste your NVIDIA API key before chatting.
settings.base_url_helper: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (e.g. LM Studio or NVIDIA NIM)
settings.base_url_apple_disabled_helper: Not used when Apple Foundation Models is selected.
settings.api_key_helper: Required for hosted providers such as NVIDIA NIM; usually not needed for local LLMs
settings.api_key_apple_disabled_helper: Not used for on-device Apple Foundation Models.
settings.apple_model_helper: Uses the on-device Foundation Models framework when available.
settings.model_error_helper: Showing current value (failed to fetch list)
settings.model_error_message: Failed to fetch model list. Check Base URL / API Key and reload.
settings.compatibility_model_missing_next: Choose a fetched model or update the model name before starting Plan Mode.
settings.compatibility_preflight_failed_next: Check the Base URL, API key, and that the server exposes an OpenAI-compatible /models route, then refresh the model list.
settings.plan_mode_support_subtitle: Copy a redacted JSON snapshot with endpoint, model, preflight status, and report paths for issue reports.
settings.assistant_coding_desc: Responds with stricter, engineering-focused answers for technical tasks
settings.assistant_plan_desc: Automatically starts planning for a new coding thread so you can review a workflow before implementation begins
settings.assistant_plan_foundation_models_disable: Plan mode is disabled for Apple Foundation Models because the local provider does not support the full multi-step planning and tool-calling contract. Use General or Coding mode, or switch to an OpenAI-compatible provider for Plan Mode.
settings.profile_helper: Referenced when starting a new session
settings.preferences_hint: e.g. Conclusion first / Bullet points / Code examples
settings.do_not_label: Things to Avoid (one item per line)
settings.clear_memory_confirm: Delete all profile, summaries, and memories?
settings.max_tokens_helper: Maximum number of tokens to generate
settings.reasoning_effort_helper: Sends OpenAI-compatible reasoning_effort. If the API rejects it with HTTP 400, Caverno retries without the field.
settings.prefix_stable_tool_loop_desc: Send a stable full tool list across tool-loop requests to improve local KV-cache reuse. Dynamic tool search remains the default when this is off.
settings.semantic_search_desc: Index conversation history with embeddings so history search ranks by meaning. Falls back to full-text search when embeddings are unavailable. Requires an OpenAI-compatible endpoint and an embeddings model.
settings.embeddings_model_helper: Model id passed to /v1/embeddings (e.g. text-embedding-3-small or a local embedding model).
settings.google_chat_webhook_helper: Incoming webhook used for routine delivery and test posts.
settings.google_chat_test_missing: Enter a Google Chat webhook URL first.
settings.google_chat_test_message: Caverno test message from the Google Chat integration.
settings.mcp_enable_desc: Allow LLM to use tools like web search
settings.coding_approval_default_desc: Ask before file edits, Python scripts, local write commands, and git writes.
settings.coding_approval_auto_review_desc: Use the configured LLM endpoint to review code and local execution approval requests.
settings.coding_approval_full_access_desc: Run file, Python script, local command, and git write tools without Caverno approval prompts.
settings.chat_approval_default_desc: Ask before each high-risk chat action (browser, SSH, BLE, serial).
settings.chat_approval_auto_review_desc: Use the configured LLM endpoint to review chat tool actions automatically.
settings.chat_approval_full_access_desc: Run browser, SSH, and device actions without Caverno approval prompts.
settings.coding_agents_md_desc: Inject the project root AGENTS.md (and AGENTS.override.md if present, with higher priority) into the system prompt while in Coding or Plan mode.
settings.coding_verification_feedback_desc: Run scoped Dart or Flutter tests before accepting completion claims after coding edits.
settings.coding_verification_trigger_completion_d: Run scoped tests before accepting coding completion.
settings.coding_verification_trigger_request_only: Skip automatic completion checks; allow explicit test requests.
settings.coding_verification_trigger_off_desc: Disable automatic and request-driven verification feedback.
settings.live_llm_diagnostics_desc: Check whether the selected live model understands Caverno instructions, tool calls, tool results, tool search, subagents, and remote MCP exposure.
settings.live_llm_diag_probe_instruction_desc: Verifies exact JSON output without tools.
settings.live_llm_diag_probe_exact_preservation_d: Checks exact copying of unit, money, raw tool-result, date, ID, and URL values.
settings.live_llm_diag_probe_fm_language_matrix_d: Checks English, Japanese, and tool-bridge prompts for Foundation Models locale safety.
settings.live_llm_diag_probe_tool_call_desc: Checks whether the model emits get_current_datetime with a narrow tool set.
settings.live_llm_diag_probe_tool_result_desc: Executes a safe built-in tool and asks the model to incorporate the result.
settings.live_llm_diag_probe_harness_desc: Checks tool choice with Caverno's initial tool selection pressure.
settings.live_llm_diag_probe_tool_search_desc: Checks whether the model can use tool_search to discover subagent capability.
settings.live_llm_diag_probe_subagent_desc: Checks whether the model can emit a well-formed spawn_subagent request without executing it.
settings.live_llm_diag_probe_remote_mcp_desc: Reports whether trusted remote MCP servers loaded tools into the harness.
settings.live_llm_diag_profile_history_empty: No profile revisions recorded yet for this model. Run a probe to start tracking history.
settings.foundation_models_live_canary_desc: Run the local macOS canary when Apple Foundation Models is selected. It checks basic responses, locale rejection handling, and the single-step textual tool bridge.
settings.foundation_models_live_canary_report_cop: Foundation Models canary result path copied.
settings.macos_updates_status_unavailable: Sparkle updates are only available on macOS.
settings.macos_updates_status_unconfigured: Set the Sparkle appcast URL and public EdDSA key for release builds.
settings.macos_updates_status_failed: Could not read Sparkle update status.
settings.mcp_no_enabled_servers: Enable at least one MCP server with a valid URL
settings.tool_get_current_datetime: Get current date, time, and relative date ranges
settings.tool_ask_user_question: Ask the user a choice question before continuing
settings.tool_spawn_subagent: Delegate a focused sub-task to a child subagent
settings.tool_get_subagent_result: Retrieve the result of a background subagent
settings.tool_load_skill: Load full instructions for a saved user skill
settings.tool_save_skill: Save the current workflow as a reusable user skill (requires approval)
settings.tool_ping: Ping a host to check reachability and latency
settings.tool_ping6: Ping an IPv6 host using ICMPv6
settings.tool_arp: Inspect the local ARP/NDP neighbor cache
settings.tool_ndp: Inspect the local IPv6 neighbor discovery cache
settings.tool_route_lookup: Show the selected route, gateway, and interface
settings.tool_interface_info: Inspect local interfaces, addresses, and MTU
settings.tool_dns_query: Query a specific DNS record type
settings.tool_port_check: Check if a TCP port is open
settings.tool_http_status: Check HTTP status code of a URL
settings.tool_traceroute: Trace the network path to a host
settings.tool_path_mtu: Discover the path MTU to a host
settings.tool_os_get_system_info: Get local operating system name and version
settings.tool_os_log_read: Read recent local OS logs for WiFi or auth issues
settings.tool_computer_request_permissions: Request macOS Accessibility and Screen Recording permissions
settings.tool_computer_accessibility_snapshot: Read a bounded macOS accessibility snapshot
settings.tool_computer_screenshot_window: Capture a specific macOS window screenshot
settings.tool_computer_type_text: Type text into the focused macOS control
settings.tool_computer_switch_space: Switch to an adjacent macOS Space
settings.tool_list_directory: List files and directories in the local project
settings.tool_read_file: Read a UTF-8 text file from the local project
settings.tool_write_file: Write or create a UTF-8 text file in the local project
settings.tool_edit_file: Replace exact text inside a local UTF-8 file
settings.tool_rollback_last_file_change: Roll back the most recent local file change
settings.tool_find_files: Find files by wildcard pattern in the local project
settings.tool_search_files: Search text across local project files
settings.tool_resolve_installed_dependency: Resolve installed dependency APIs from local lockfiles
settings.tool_local_execute_command: Execute a local shell command in the project
settings.tool_run_tests: Run scoped Dart or Flutter tests in the project
settings.tool_run_python_script: Write and run a Python script on-device to compute answers (e.g. analyze an attached image's metadata)
settings.confirm_file_mutations_desc: Ask before write_file or edit_file changes are applied.
settings.routine_computer_use_allowlist_help: Allow scheduled routines to run specific Computer Use action tools only when the tool name and target boundaries match an enabled rule.
settings.routine_computer_use_allowlist_empty: No automatic Computer Use action rules are configured.
settings.routine_computer_use_allowlist_no_bounda: Add at least one boundary before this rule can run.
settings.routine_computer_use_allowlist_exact_tex: Leave empty to allow any generated text when the other boundaries match.
settings.routine_computer_use_allowlist_boundary_: Add at least one target, app, window, risk, or exact text boundary.
settings.show_memory_updates_desc: Display internal memory extraction and update cards in assistant messages.
settings.enable_llm_session_logs_desc: Opt in to sensitive local JSONL logs for Chat, Coding, and Routines LLM requests and responses.
settings.tool_ssh_execute_command: Execute a command on an SSH server
settings.tool_lan_scan: Scan the local network for active hosts
settings.browser_tools_desc: Let the agent open pages, fill forms, and scrape data in an embedded browser
settings.tool_browser_open: Open a URL in the built-in browser
settings.tool_browser_snapshot: List interactive elements on the page
settings.tool_browser_get_content: Read page text or HTML for scraping
settings.tool_browser_screenshot: Capture a screenshot of the page
settings.tool_browser_wait: Wait for the page or an element to load
settings.tool_browser_eval: Run JavaScript in the page (requires approval)
settings.tool_browser_save_data: Save extracted data to a file (requires approval)
settings.voicevox_preview_text: こんにちは、音声プレビューです
settings.language_helper: Applies to both the app UI and assistant language.
settings.import_confirm: Importing settings will overwrite current values. Continue?
settings.qr_scan_hint: Point your camera at a settings QR code
settings.qr_import_confirm: Restore settings from QR code? Current settings will be overwritten.
settings.qr_data_too_large: Settings data is too large to encode as a QR code. Please use file export instead.
settings.model_routing_menu_desc: Run secondary calls on a smaller model
settings.mesh_menu_desc: Discover and register OpenAI-compatible endpoints on your network
settings.mesh_intro: Scan your local network for OpenAI-compatible inference servers (LM Studio, Ollama, llama.cpp) and register the ones to route across. Discovery only probes GET /v1/models and never sends your API key to unverified hosts.
settings.mesh_scan_error: Scan failed. Check your network connection and try again.
settings.mesh_no_results: No OpenAI-compatible endpoints found on the network.
settings.local_stack_intro: Manage models exposed by the primary llama.cpp router endpoint. Load and unload controls are available only when the server is running in router mode with a models directory.
settings.local_stack_prepare_roles_empty: No role models are assigned to this endpoint.
settings.local_stack_prepare_roles_summary: {} of {} role models need loading on this endpoint.
settings.local_stack_prepare_no_primary_roles: No role models are assigned to this endpoint.
settings.local_stack_prepare_no_endpoint_roles: No role models are assigned to this endpoint.
settings.local_stack_prepare_no_work: Role models are already prepared ({} ready).
settings.local_stack_prepare_partial: Role models prepared with issues: {} loaded, {} failed, {} skipped.
settings.local_stack_empty: No managed models reported by this endpoint.
settings.local_stack_unsupported_default: Model lifecycle management is unavailable for this endpoint.
settings.local_stack_load_error: Failed to load local stack status: {}
settings.local_stack_resource_unavailable: Resource guidance needs detected host memory.
settings.local_stack_resource_assumption: Assumes a {} GB safe budget with model metadata and context overhead.
settings.local_stack_resource_fit_close: Near safe memory budget (~{} GB estimated)
settings.local_stack_resource_fit_tooLarge: Exceeds safe memory budget (~{} GB estimated)
settings.local_stack_role_suggest_main: {} falls back to main model {}; consider assigning {} for faster background calls.
settings.local_stack_role_suggest_assigned: {} uses {}; consider {} for a smaller fit model on this endpoint.
settings.local_stack_role_missing: {} uses {}, but that model is missing from this router catalog.
settings.local_stack_role_no_candidate_main: {} falls back to main model {}; no smaller fit role model was found in this catalog.
settings.local_stack_role_no_candidate_assigned: {} uses {}; no smaller fit role model was found in this catalog.
settings.local_stack_speedup_ngram_recommended: Try --spec-type ngram-simple when starting llama.cpp; it needs no draft model when supported by your build.
settings.local_stack_speedup_ngram_configured: Ngram speculative decoding appears enabled with --spec-type ngram-simple.
settings.local_stack_speedup_draft_recommended: For coding/subagent model {}, consider compatible draft model {} with llama.cpp draft-model speculation.
settings.local_stack_speedup_draft_needs_model: For coding/subagent model {}, add a much smaller compatible draft model before enabling draft-model speculation.
settings.local_stack_speedup_draft_target_missing: Coding/subagent model {} is assigned here but is missing from this router catalog.
settings.local_stack_speedup_draft_configured: Draft-model speculation appears configured for coding/subagent model {}.
settings.model_routing_intro: Route secondary LLM calls to a different model than the main conversation. A smaller, faster model keeps memory extraction and background work snappy while the main model focuses on your conversation. "Default" uses the main model.
settings.model_routing_apple_unsupported: Model routing is unavailable while the Apple Foundation Models provider is selected, because it serves a single on-device model.
settings.model_routing_memory_extraction_desc: Extracts session memory after each assistant response.
settings.model_routing_approval_auto_review_desc: Pre-reviews high-risk tool calls before asking you.
settings.harness_config_intro: Tune how the agent behaves for the active model. Empty fields and zero limits keep the built-in behaviour, so a model with no overrides works exactly as before.
settings.harness_config_bootstrap_helper: Guidance for how the agent should start a task.
settings.harness_config_execution_helper: Guidance for how the agent should make changes.
settings.harness_config_verification_helper: Guidance for how the agent should verify before finishing.
settings.harness_config_failure_recovery_helper: Guidance for how the agent should recover after a tool error.
settings.harness_config_tool_loop_cap_helper: Maximum base tool-loop turns (0 uses the default of 12, max 100).
settings.harness_config_recovery_toggle_helper: Prime the model to diagnose and recover instead of blindly retrying a failed tool.
settings.harness_config_exploration_toggle_helper: Push the model from exploring to implementing once it understands the task.
settings.personal_eval_cases_menu_desc: Recorded tasks for scoring new models
settings.personal_eval_cases_intro: Recorded real tasks replayed to score candidate models. Held-out cases are kept hidden from the self-improving loop and used only as the regression gate. Cases are local-only and excluded from export.
settings.personal_eval_cases_empty: No recorded cases yet. Record a completed session to build your eval suite.
settings.personal_eval_bake_off_input_hint: Model id to compare against the active model
settings.idle_maintenance_intro: When idle, on AC power, and inside the window, Caverno can re-measure and tune local models using free local compute. Runs locally with no interactive approval.
settings.idle_maintenance_enable_desc: Off by default. Maintenance never runs unless enabled.
settings.idle_maintenance_window_hint: An end earlier than the start wraps past midnight (e.g. 23:00 → 06:00).
settings.idle_maintenance_require_ac_desc: On laptops, only run while plugged in. Ignored on desktops with no battery.
settings.idle_maintenance_debug_menu_desc: Trigger the pipeline manually, bypassing the idle gate
settings.idle_maintenance_debug_intro: Runs the full maintenance pipeline immediately, ignoring the idle, power, and window gate. Each stage hits the live model just as an overnight run would. Use this to debug stage behavior on demand.
settings.personal_eval_record_consent_helper: Captures your prompt and repo state as a replayable case. Stored locally and excluded from export.
settings.personal_eval_record_repo_ref_helper: A commit SHA or tag the task started from, so the case can be replayed against the same state.

routines.title: Routines
routines.subtitle: Manage repeatable prompts that run on a schedule while the app is open or when it resumes.
routines.interval_value_required: Enter an interval of at least 1.
routines.enabled_hint: Disabled routines stay in the list but will not run automatically.
routines.notify_on_completion_hint: Send a local notification after scheduled runs finish.
routines.tools_enabled_hint: Allow web, memory, network, read-only file, and Computer Use observation tools during routine runs.
routines.workspace_directory_hint: Optional absolute directory for routine state files.
routines.workspace_directory_required: Add a workspace directory before enabling writes.
routines.allow_workspace_writes_hint: Allow write_file and edit_file only inside the workspace directory.
routines.completion_action_hint: Choose what happens after this routine finishes.
routines.completion_action_prompt_google_chat: Let the prompt post to Google Chat
routines.google_chat_rule_hint: Choose which runs are allowed to post to Google Chat.
routines.run_due_now_empty: No routines are due right now.
routines.history_empty: No runs yet. Use Run now or wait for the next scheduled execution.
routines.not_found: This routine is no longer available.
routines.empty_body: Create a routine to keep recurring tasks in one place and run them on a schedule.
routines.attention_subtitle: Running now, due now, or failed on the latest run.
routines.scheduled_subtitle: Enabled routines that are queued for a future run.
routines.paused_subtitle: Disabled routines stay here until you enable them again.

worktree_agent.banner_review_ready: {count} worktree agent task(s) ready for review
worktree_agent.run_status_last: Last run: {started} started, {executed} executed, {failed} failed, {skipped} skipped.
